description: Search EventMatey events by location. The current v1 implementation uses location_text plus date/category/price filters. Latitude/longitude and radius are accepted for forward compatibility but are not yet used for true distance search.

labels.name: get_event_details
labels.description: Get fuller public details for one discoverable EventMatey event, including the canonical hosted booking URL.

findings.title: Toxic flow: untrusted input can reach an external sink
findings.detail: Server "mcp" exposes tools that together enable an exfiltration flow. Untrusted content: get_event_details · Public sink: search_events_nearby.

evidence.snippet: Untrusted content: get_event_details · Public sink: search_events_nearby

findings.remediation: Do not co-install these capabilities under one trust boundary; an injected comment/email can steer the model to exfiltrate via the sink tool.
